impact: Starlette 0.49 transitively requires anyio>=4.7. Resolver gap will be caught by the docker-build TestClient boot smoke; if it fires, add explicit pin then.
resolution: Resolved by observation. T-002 deploy confirmed starlette 0.49.3 imports + serves cleanly under the actual resolved transitive deps (TestClient GET / -> 200, live Cloudflare traffic 200, no anyio import errors in startup logs). The docker build's `pip install` resolved anyio to a compatible version automatically; no explicit pin needed.
title: [deps] Starlette 0.49 transitively requires anyio>=4.7. Resolver gap will be caught by
